creator: h2+bugreports@fsfe.org
text:
The problem is not purely FreeBSD related. I installed Debian unstable,=20
if Debian ist told to use KMS, the problem does not occur, if Debian=20
runs without KMS it exhibits the same problem as FreeBSD.

So I guess it is really caused by some update in xf86-video-ati=E2=80=A6
